workOrder.summary: Add an in-page detail disclosure to student requirement rows using already scoped dashboard data.

selectionReason: The prior handoff pointed to deeper student requirement detail. The existing student dashboard payload already had requirement, submission, evidence, progress, deadline, and feedback data, so an in-page disclosure was the safest useful next slice.
repoEvidence: docs/student-progress-dashboard.md listed deeper student-safe requirement detail as the next backlog item.
workspace.js rendered requirement rows with description, due date, quality prompt, evidence count, and submit/focus actions, but no row-level detail disclosure.
/api/student/dashboard already scoped all data through the student dashboard route; no new route was needed.

candidateSummary.decision: deferred until exact scoped filter mapping is proven

privacyAndPermissionNotes: No auth, RBAC, tenant, site, program, mentor assignment, or student privacy boundary was broadened.
The detail disclosure renders only data already returned by the own-student dashboard response.
No staff-only comments, raw storage identifiers, secrets, migrations, deploys, remote writes, domain/OAuth, or Cloudflare config changes were added.

validationResult.notes: Full closeout validation passed; git diff --check reported CRLF normalization warnings only.

nextRecommendedWorkOrder: Prove exact missing-submission or evidence-attention drill-down mapping to a supported scoped Review Queue or Student Directory filter before exposing a staff control.
